action.reasoning: Observation: freezing the CLIP backbone with the default full-finetune learning rate (3e-5) failed badly (0.0192 Quickdraw, low source val), meaning the random classifier head barely learned. Analysis: this does not invalidate frozen CLIP features; the LR was inappropriate for training a new linear head. A frozen-head-only CLIP linear probe should use a much larger LR, and if it learns a clean Sketch classifier while preserving pretrained CLIP features it may generalize better than full fine-tuning. Decision: rerun frozen-backbone Sketch-only training with LR=1e-3 for 12 epochs and submit evaluation.
